project.name: clearfintech
project.purpose: Payment processing and merchant services platform for SMBs with full regulatory compliance (PCI-DSS, SOX, AML/KYC, data privacy).
project.description: Payment processing and merchant services platform for SMBs with full regulatory compliance (PCI-DSS, SOX, AML/KYC, data privacy).

module_map.purpose: Unified API entry point. Owns routing, authentication middleware, and rate limiting.

Merchant lifecycle orchestration. Application intake, document collection, workflow state machine. Calls compliance for identity verification and payments for account provisioning. Never performs those operations itself.
Transaction lifecycle: authorization, capture, settlement, reconciliation. Hard wall from compliance domain.
AML monitoring, SAR filing, audit trails, regulatory reporting, FinCEN integration. Hard wall from payments domain. FinCEN filing content and SAR data never leave this domain.
PII vault. Tokenized data storage, data access controls. Other domains access customer data only through controlled shared interfaces that mask and tokenize before data crosses the boundary.
Merchant portal. Only ever receives tokenized or masked data. No access to raw PII, financial data, or customer bank information.
Types, interfaces, and constants. No business logic, no data access. The only legal crossing point between domains.
QA reports and validation findings. Append-only. Preserved as audit evidence.
Seed data directory. Locked to customers domain access only. Flagged for migration to customers/data/ once domain structure is stood up. Synthetic data treated with production-grade handling rules.

required_artifacts.purpose: Security policy and vulnerability disclosure. Content derived from the constitution's sensitivity tiers and principles plus the project charter.
Compliance posture documenting PCI-DSS, SOX, AML/KYC, and data privacy handling. Content derived from the compliance sections of the README and constitution.

principles.name: integer-arithmetic-for-financials
principles.statement: All financial calculations must be performed using integer arithmetic in cents, never floating point. Floating point arithmetic for financial values is a hard violation.
principles.text: All financial calculations must be performed using integer arithmetic in cents, never floating point. Floating point arithmetic for financial values is a hard violation.

principles.name: compliance-supremacy
principles.statement: Compliance wins over everything, always, with no exceptions. There is no scenario where speed, convenience, or feature velocity overrides a compliance requirement. If the fastest path risks exposing PII, skipping an audit trail, or storing data unencrypted even temporarily, that path does not exist. The agent stops, flags it, and waits for human direction.
principles.text: Compliance wins over everything, always, with no exceptions. There is no scenario where speed, convenience, or feature velocity overrides a compliance requirement. If the fastest path risks exposing PII, skipping an audit trail, or storing data unencrypted even temporarily, that path does not exist. The agent stops, flags it, and waits for human direction.

principles.name: domain-separation
principles.statement: Domain boundaries are structural and enforced, not advisory. Payments cannot access compliance data and vice versa. Dashboard cannot access raw PII or financial data. Customers is a vault accessed only through controlled interfaces. No agent crosses domain boundaries. No two agents write in the same space at the same time.
principles.text: Domain boundaries are structural and enforced, not advisory. Payments cannot access compliance data and vice versa. Dashboard cannot access raw PII or financial data. Customers is a vault accessed only through controlled interfaces. No agent crosses domain boundaries. No two agents write in the same space at the same time.

principles.name: audit-trail-completeness
principles.statement: Every operation that touches financial data or PII must have a corresponding audit log entry. Missing audit trail coverage is a failed check, not a warning. Nothing ships without complete audit trails.
principles.text: Every operation that touches financial data or PII must have a corresponding audit log entry. Missing audit trail coverage is a failed check, not a warning. Nothing ships without complete audit trails.

principles.name: sensitive-data-protection
principles.statement: Sensitive data must never appear in logs, error messages, API responses, or code comments. PII, card numbers, SSNs, bank account numbers, routing numbers, encryption keys, JWT secrets, merchant tax IDs, EINs, SAR data, and FinCEN filing content are all classified and handled according to their sensitivity tier. SAR existence itself is restricted information under federal law.
principles.text: Sensitive data must never appear in logs, error messages, API responses, or code comments. PII, card numbers, SSNs, bank account numbers, routing numbers, encryption keys, JWT secrets, merchant tax IDs, EINs, SAR data, and FinCEN filing content are all classified and handled according to their sensitivity tier. SAR existence itself is restricted information under federal law.

principles.name: cross-domain-interfaces-only
principles.statement: Cross-domain communication happens exclusively through the shared/interfaces layer with typed contracts. No domain may import directly from another domain's internals. This is a hard violation — full stop, not a warning.
principles.text: Cross-domain communication happens exclusively through the shared/interfaces layer with typed contracts. No domain may import directly from another domain's internals. This is a hard violation — full stop, not a warning.

principles.name: quality-gates-absolute
principles.statement: Quality gates are absolute. No person and no agent may override or bypass them. All gates must pass before any change ships.
principles.text: Quality gates are absolute. No person and no agent may override or bypass them. All gates must pass before any change ships.

principles.name: seed-data-as-production
principles.statement: Seed data and synthetic data are treated with production-grade handling rules. The data/ directory is locked to customers domain access only and flagged for migration to customers/data/ once domain structure is stood up.
principles.text: Seed data and synthetic data are treated with production-grade handling rules. The data/ directory is locked to customers domain access only and flagged for migration to customers/data/ once domain structure is stood up.

principles.name: ask-before-accessing-sensitive
principles.statement: When in doubt about whether data is sensitive or whether an operation is compliant, the agent stops and asks. No best-guess on compliance-adjacent operations.
principles.text: When in doubt about whether data is sensitive or whether an operation is compliant, the agent stops and asks. No best-guess on compliance-adjacent operations.

principles.name: independent-test-validation
principles.statement: Integration tests must be authored by an agent independent of the code author. Domain agents write their own unit tests; the QA agent writes all integration tests. This breaks the circular trust loop where the same agent's blind spots propagate to both code and test layers. Independent third-party scanning (Snyk) provides an additional baseline that no project agent authored.
principles.text: Integration tests must be authored by an agent independent of the code author. Domain agents write their own unit tests; the QA agent writes all integration tests. This breaks the circular trust loop where the same agent's blind spots propagate to both code and test layers. Independent third-party scanning (Snyk) provides an additional baseline that no project agent authored.
